expectations.text: Report follows boost template (P-XXX IDs, Executive Summary, Source section)
expectations.evidence: Uses custom structure with sections 1-7 and S1/W1/T1 IDs, no P-XXX format, no 'Source' section
Good coverage of blog's 5 workflow patterns, correctly maps them to simon-bot skills

expectations.text: Proposals reference specific skills and file paths
expectations.evidence: References specific skills in each table row, but file paths are less specific than with-skill version

expectations.text: Proposals are actionable with concrete changes
expectations.evidence: Proposals like MICRO path, routing layer, and grind budget cap are concrete and actionable
Single analysis voice throughout, no expert perspectives or multi-angle analysis

expectations.text: Includes Not Recommended section with rejected ideas
expectations.evidence: Has 'Anti-Patterns to Watch' section but no explicit rejected ideas with reasoning
